title: Hummus with Tahini
ingredients: 2 ½ cups canned chickpeas, drained and rinsed well
1/3 cup freshly squeezed lemon juice, divided
Freshly ground black pepper, to taste
Parsley and olive oil to garnish
instructions: Put ½ the lemon juice and all ingredients into the blender except the chickpeas, parsley and olive oil to garnish.
Add the chickpeas and blend on high until it reaches a smooth consistency, about 15 seconds.
Blend in remaining lemon juice to taste.
If it is too thick, add more water or lemon juice until desired consistency.
Transfer to bowl, cover and refrigerate a few hours for flavors to meld.
To serve, place in serving bowl, drizzle lightly with olive oil and garnish with parsley.
notes: Before hummus was popular and easily available, this is the recipe that was used to make homemade hummus.
